header.logoDescription: Logo of the Confluences & Frontieres association

association.description: Association of amateurs, developers and experts.

projectDescription.title: Confluences & Frontieres
projectDescription.description: CONFLUENCES & FRONTIERES is an intercultural exchange project proposed, from 2023, within the framework of partnerships between the INTER+VALUE association, created in Brittany (France), and various interested European structures.

partners.title: Partners
partners.description: Organisations and territories that have joined the project

activities.title: Our Activities
activities.description: Between visual creations and live experiences, we imagine and produce events that go beyond the norm.

mainDescription.description: Designed from an agreement between INTER+VALUE and the Portuguese municipality of Vimioso, the project is developed as a multi-year program.

projectDescription.description: Designed from an agreement between INTER+VALUE and the Portuguese municipality of Vimioso, the project is developed as a multi-year program carried by citizens and involved territories.

hisName.description: The name CONFLUENCES & FRONTIERES was inspired by the desire for knowledge and dissemination of the cultures and heritage of the territories involved in the project.

partnersDescription.imageDescription: Logo of the municipality of Vimioso.
partnersDescription.description1: The first partnership agreement was concluded in 2022 between the INTER+VALUE association and the municipality of Vimioso (Portugal).
partnersDescription.description2: Presented by INTER+VALUE to some of its educational partners, the project has attracted the adhesion of various entities.
partnersDescription.subTitle: Our current partners:

mainActivity.title: ACTIVITIES, PRODUCTIONS AND CONTENTS
mainActivity.description: The project aims to make known, enhance and disseminate the culture and heritage of the individuals and territories concerned.

objectifsDescription.description: The planned meetings, events and productions aim to:

list.1: share content related to the knowledge and enhancement of culture and heritage.
list.2: debate questions of cultural and economic development and cross-border relations.
list.3: involve the search for innovative solutions for future development.

mainBiennaleDescription.title: THE INTERCULTURAL BIENNIALS
mainBiennaleDescription.description: Organised in Vimioso for the first time in autumn 2023 by INTER+VALUE and the local municipality.

list.1: An international, intercultural and multilingual congress.
list.2: Exhibitions of artistic, literary and religious works.
list.3: An entertainment area with a market and workshops.
list.6: Visits to museums and remarkable sites.
list.9: The edition of a multilingual magazine.
